product_overview: A public web application that visualizes housing legislation, projects, officials, and news on interactive maps and lists so visitors can explore policy activity geographically and by topic. Pages are public and optimized for browsing bills, projects, news, and contextual documentation.
core_goals: Explore housing policy geographically using an animated globe and interactive choropleth maps
Find and read tracked legislation and detailed bill information
Browse housing projects and view project details and statuses
Read housing news and short AI-style summaries to stay informed
Discover politicians relevant to housing policy and filter by country/region
Search across bills, projects, and officials from any page
Read project methodology and data source provenance
Contact the project team via a public contact form

features.name: Dashboard and interactive map
features.description: Landing page with an animated globe that reveals an interactive choropleth map, region lenses, summary metrics, and in-page links to bills, news, projects, and politicians.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See globe hero and heading 'Tracking housing policy across Canada' -> Scroll the page to reveal the map -> See a North America choropleth with colored provinces and region tabs (N. America, Europe, Asia)
Navigate to / -> Scroll to reveal the map -> Switch the map region to Europe -> See the map update to the European view
Navigate to / -> Scroll to reveal the map -> Pan and zoom the map -> Observe province and state shapes respond to pan/zoom
Navigate to / -> Scroll to reveal the map -> Follow an in-page link to the bills section -> See the bills section or linked listing

features.name: Map province side panel
features.description: Clicking a province or state on the map opens a left-side panel with the region's name and tabs to explore bills, figures, news, projects, and metrics for that region.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll the page to reveal the map -> Select a colored province on the map -> See a side panel open with the province name and navigation tabs (Bills, Figures, News, Projects, Metrics)
Navigate to / -> Scroll to the map -> Select a province -> Open the Bills tab in the side panel -> See a list of legislation items for that province
Navigate to / -> Scroll to the map -> Select a province -> Close the side panel -> Return to the full map view

features.name: Census-division drill-down and project dots
features.description: Drill into supported provinces to view census division boundaries and project locations, with a legend for project types and breadcrumb navigation to return to higher-level views.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll the page to reveal the map -> Select a drill-down province (e.g., Quebec or Ontario) -> See the map zoom to census-division level and project dots appear
Navigate to / -> Reveal the map -> Drill into a province -> See project dots colored by type and a 'Project types' legend describing colors
Navigate to / -> Reveal the map -> Drill into a province -> See breadcrumb navigation showing 'North America > Canada > [Province]' -> Use breadcrumb navigation to return to the Canada view

features.name: Dimension toggle for map coloring
features.description: Toggle the map's coloring dimension to view different metrics (stance, crisis severity, affordability, supply, rental market, ownership) and see an appropriate legend update.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll past the map to the 'Color map by' section -> Change the dimension to 'Crisis severity' -> See the map colors update and a legend showing 'Severe' and 'Manageable' categories
Navigate to / -> Scroll to 'Color map by' -> Change the dimension to 'Affordability' -> See a gradient legend from 'Low activity' to 'High activity' and map colors update

features.name: Legislation and bills browsing
features.description: Browse, sort, filter, and search the tracked legislation from a dedicated bills listing and open items for detail.
user_flows: Navigate to /bills -> See a table of legislation rows with bill code, title, jurisdiction, stage, and a stance badge
Navigate to /bills -> Type a query (e.g., 'housing') into the search input -> See the table filter rows in real time
Navigate to /bills -> Open a bill or legislation row from the table -> See the bill detail page with full information

features.name: Bill detail viewing
features.description: View full details for a bill including title, jurisdiction, stage timeline, stance, and a summary paragraph after opening a bill from listings or map context.
user_flows: Open a bill from the bills table or map side panel -> See a bill detail page with title, jurisdiction, current stage and a stage timeline (Filed, Committee, Floor, Enacted) -> See a stance badge and summary paragraph

features.name: Projects explorer
features.description: Browse housing project cards with key information and open project details to learn unit counts, status, and descriptions.
user_flows: Navigate to /projects -> See a list or grid of project cards each showing name/location/unit count/status
Navigate to /projects -> Scan project cards for unit counts and status -> Open a project card for full detail -> See project name, location, unit count, status, and a description

features.name: Project detail viewing
features.description: See detailed information for a selected housing project including scope, location, unit counts, status, and descriptive blurb.
user_flows: Open a project from /projects -> See the project detail view with project name, location, unit count, status, and description

features.name: Politicians directory and filters
features.description: Filter and browse a directory of politicians relevant to housing policy by country or region, with quick search and clear filter capabilities.
user_flows: Navigate to /politicians -> See official cards rendered and a country filter control present
Navigate to /politicians -> Confirm Canada is the default selection or Canadian officials are shown -> Change the country filter to United States -> See the displayed officials update
Navigate to /politicians -> Apply filters (region, party, search) -> Clear filters -> Browse the refreshed results

features.name: News index and AI overview
features.description: Browse housing news articles and read an optional AI-style overview summary surfaced on the home page when available.
user_flows: Navigate to /news -> See news article cards with title and summary text
Navigate to /news -> Open a news article from the list -> See the news detail view
Navigate to / -> See AI overview content on the home page when the static summaries are loaded

features.name: Globe visualization
features.description: A dedicated globe page presenting an interactive 3D or canvas globe of tracked countries that visitors can rotate to inspect global coverage.
user_flows: Navigate to /globe -> See a 3D canvas or SVG globe rendered -> Rotate the globe by dragging to inspect tracked countries

features.name: Contact form with client validation
features.description: A public contact form for visitors to send messages to the team, with client-side validation for required fields.
user_flows: Navigate to /contact -> Fill in Name, Email, and Message fields -> Submit the form -> See a success confirmation or acknowledgement
Navigate to /contact -> Submit the form with empty required fields -> See validation feedback indicating required fields

features.name: About and data sources
features.description: Informational pages describing the project and listing data sources and provenance for transparency.
user_flows: Navigate to /about -> Read the project description -> Follow the link to data sources -> See the /about/data-sources content

features.name: Methodology documentation
features.description: Methodology page explaining how bills are classified and stance definitions used across the site.
user_flows: Navigate to /methodology -> Read the methodology content including stance definitions (favorable, restrictive, concerning, review)

features.name: Health status footer
features.description: A layout footer showing overall pipeline/data freshness and a clickable element to view per-source health details.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Observe the health footer indicator showing data freshness or 'All sources live' text -> Click the health indicator -> See a popup or modal with individual source health details

features.name: Global search modal
features.description: Keyboard-triggered site search that surfaces results across bills, projects, and officials from any page.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Trigger the search shortcut (Ctrl+K or Cmd+K) -> See the search modal or overlay appear -> Type 'housing' into the search input -> See results across bills, projects, and officials -> Open a result to navigate to the relevant page

features.name: Visitor presence widget
features.description: Optional visitor count widget that displays presence information or a cosmetic fallback when the backing store is unconfigured.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Observe the visitor presence widget in the layout footer or header showing a visitor count or a fallback indicator

tech_stack: MapLibre GL, Framer Motion, cobe, react-simple-maps, d3-geo

routes.description: Main housing policy tracker dashboard with map, summaries, legislation, projects, politicians, and live news sections
Interactive globe visualization for housing context
Experimental COBE hero sandbox (may fetch external geo JSON)

features.name: Dashboard and interactive map
features.description: Landing experience with hero, dimension toggles, scroll-linked map shell, and summary metrics for housing policy tracking
user_interactions: Scroll the page to reveal lazy-loaded sections
Toggle dimension or lens controls where offered
Follow in-page links to bills, news, projects, or politicians

features.name: Legislation and bills browsing
features.description: Explore housing-related legislation and bill listings with table interactions and links to detail routes
user_interactions: Sort or filter table columns where UI provides controls
Open a bill or legislation row to view detail
Navigate back to home or related sections

features.name: News and AI overview
features.description: Live news section and optional AI-style overview fed from static news summaries JSON
user_interactions: Browse news list and open an article
Read overview content on the home page when loaded

features.name: Projects explorer
features.description: CMHC and other housing project listings with navigation to project detail pages
user_interactions: Open a project for full detail

features.name: Politicians directory
features.description: Filterable list of politicians relevant to housing policy tracking
user_interactions: Apply filters (region, party, search, etc. as exposed in UI)

features.name: Health status footer
features.description: Small footer chip polling pipeline health for data freshness display
user_interactions: Observe health or freshness indicator in the layout footer

features.name: Visitor presence widget
features.description: Optional live visitor count via Vercel KV; UI degrades gracefully when KV is not configured
user_interactions: Page load triggers background heartbeat to visitor API when configured

known_limitations.issue: Visitor count and heartbeat return 503 when Vercel KV env vars are missing; widget uses cosmetic fallback
known_limitations.impact: No real-time visitor count in local or unprovisioned deployments

known_limitations.issue: Sandbox routes under /sandbox are experimental and may depend on external assets or heavier WebGL usage
known_limitations.impact: Higher flake risk in automated browser tests than core marketing pages
